# Kazuma Matsumoto

> Security researcher specializing in offensive security, vulnerability research, and AI-assisted code analysis.

This is the personal blog of Kazuma Matsumoto (松本一真), a security researcher at GMO Cybersecurity by Ierae, Inc. The blog covers vulnerability research, AI-assisted security analysis, and offensive security.

## Author

- Name: Kazuma Matsumoto (松本一真)
- Title: Security Researcher
- Employer: GMO Cybersecurity by Ierae, Inc.
- Website: https://y637f9qq2x.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/y637F9QQ2x
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/y637f9qq2x

## CVEs Discovered

- CVE-2026-20943: Microsoft Office — Click-to-Run elevation of privilege
- CVE-2026-25075: strongSwan — Integer underflow in EAP-TTLS AVP parser
- CVE-2026-32854: LibVNCServer — Null pointer dereference in HTTP proxy handlers
- CVE-2026-5720: miniupnpd — Out-of-bounds read in SOAPAction header parsing
- CVE-2026-28525: SWUpdate — Out-of-bounds heap read in multipart upload parser

- [Hook, Nonce, Bypass: The Structural Root of WordPress Plugin Vulnerabilities](https://y637f9qq2x.com/posts/wordpress-plugin-vulnerabilities/)
- [Finding a 15-Year-Old Zero-Day in strongSwan with AI-Assisted Code Analysis](https://y637f9qq2x.com/posts/cve-2026-25075/)
